events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need interpret scenario: shackle side-loaded. In rigging, shackles should not be side-loaded; only loaded in line with bow or pin axis depending on configuration. Side loading reduces working load limit and can cause failure. Work rough-complete. Condition installed-defective/non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? Side-loaded shackle is serious rigging hazard; could lead to dropped load. Critical maybe. Need include references ASME B30, OSHA 1926.251. Need value numeric reading? Not asked for measurement numeric, but maybe estimate angle? The prompt says estimate or interpret measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. Could set value to estimated side-load angle e.g., 45 degrees? But no specific measurement given. We can set value to 0 if not applicable? The schema says use value for numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks for one. It asks to estimate measurable condition. We can estimate side load angle maybe 45°? But no visual. Better set value to 0 and explain in rationale. However they want numeric reading if asks. Could set value to represent side-load angle not measured. But to be safe, value 0. Confidence maybe 0.9. percent_complete maybe 75. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Findings: shackle is side-loaded, resulting in reduced capacity and potential pin/bow failure. Actions: remove from service, replace/reposition shackle to ensure in-line loading, inspect, retrain. Rationale. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

  "findings": [
    "Shackle is side-loaded, placing load outside the intended in-line plane of the bow or pin.",
    "Side loading significantly reduces the shackle's working load limit and can deform or fracture the bow/pin.",
    "Configuration violates rigging best practice and applicable safe-use requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately remove the side-loaded shackle from service.",
    "Reposition or replace the shackle so the load is applied in line with the bow or pin axis as intended.",
    "Inspect the shackle and connecting hardware for deformation, wear, or damage before reuse.",
    "Brief the rigging crew on proper shackle orientation and load alignment."
  ],
  "rationale": "A shackle must be loaded in line with its designed axis; side loading introduces bending and stress concentrations that can cause sudden failure. Because the shackle is already installed and side-loaded, the rigging configuration is non-compliant and unsafe.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30",
    "OSHA 1926.251"
  ]
}
